---
page: 306
source: "Primer Curso de Contabilidad - 22va Edición"
author: "Elias Lara Flores"
---

Por el servicio de energía eléctrica pendiente de pago.

|   |   |   |   |
|---|---|---|---|
| 105 |   |   |   |
|   | 37 | Gastos de venta...........................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................
